name: Meaty Chili Without Meat
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Spaghetti sauce (combination of domestic, homemade or prepared and shiitake) cleaned
2 Hot chilies, green or red (chopped, optional)
32 oz Canned beans such as black, red kidney or pink cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add mushrooms and reduce heat to low, simmer covered stirring occasionally until the mushrooms are tender about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in chilies, cumin, chili powder, beans and spaghetti sauce. Cover and simmer for 20 to 40 minutes. Season with salt.
4. Meanwhile prepare rice: In a medium-size saucepan bring water to boil. Add rice, reduce heat and cook covered until tender about 18 minutes.
5. Serve the chili hot over rice with cilantro, lime wedges, tomatoes, yogurt or sour cream, and shredded cheddar cheese if desired.
